title: 兴趣驱动的网页图
instructions: 你面对的是一个可搜索、可跳转的小型网页世界。目标不是覆盖所有页面，而是看你会被什么吸引、如何选择和取舍。

home.title: Index of Small Interests
home.body: A tiny catalog offers links about poetry, gardens, perfume, and daily news.

poetry.title: Autumn Fragments and Women Poets
poetry.body: An essay comparing autumn imagery, illness, and self-regard across late imperial poems.

garden.title: Bamboo, Moss, and Enclosed Gardens
garden.body: A visual essay on small garden spaces, damp corridors, bamboo shadows, and seasonal stillness.

perfume.title: Cool Incense and Powder Notes
perfume.body: A short note on subtle fragrance, cooling incense, and the dislike of vulgar over-scenting.

news.title: City Briefing
news.body: A blunt summary of traffic, finance, and platform updates, useful but aesthetically thin.
